title: Cinematic Surreal Scale Portrait
sourceTitle: Create Cinematic Surreal Scale Portrait Young Woman

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create a cinematic surreal scale portrait of a young woman as a graceful giant reclining across a nighttime neon amusement park. Use the uploaded portrait photo as the appearance reference for the person. Preserve her recognizable facial features, soft youthful expression, dark braided hair, and natural skin texture. Dress her in deep indigo ethnic-inspired embroidered clothing with ornate silver headpiece, layered silver necklaces, arm cuffs, tassel earrings, pearl-like ornaments, and fine metallic details. Compose the scene from a low ground-level viewpoint with tiny visitors in the foreground for dramatic scale, glowing carousel and tower rides around her, a faint oversized translucent portrait silhouette rising behind her, shallow depth of field, cinematic blue-magenta-orange neon lighting, realistic skin, polished editorial detail, high realism, no text or watermark.

Negative Prompt：

watermark, logo, text, caption, signature, blurry face, low detail, distorted facial features, plastic skin, deformed hands, extra fingers, asymmetrical eyes, bad anatomy, flat lighting, over-smoothed skin
